overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the colorful medieval Renaissance-inspired town of Toussaint. The character moves through sunlit cobblestone streets lined with historic stone buildings and red facades, passing under decorative archways and through a dark tunnel into a back courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town entrance under grand decorative archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily forward through the cobblestone street beneath the ornate stone archway

entered.detail: large stone archway with red pillars and crenellated top, framing the entrance to the town
historic building with distinctive red columns and stone facade
irregular stone cobblestones forming the pedestrian street surface
ornate stone balustrade along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a grand decorative stone archway that serves as the entrance to a historic town. The street is narrow and enclosed by tall stone buildings with red pillars and decorative railings. The cobblestone path stretches ahead under partial sky visibility, with warm sunlight casting shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding historic street with outdoor seating and fountain

events.description: path curves gently left as the street winds through the town

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the town street, passing by NPCs resting near a stone fountain on the right

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the ground near the stone fountain
NPC walking in the opposite direction down the street

entered.detail: decorative stone fountain with basin where NPCs are gathered
wooden chairs and tables arranged outside a building
stone bridge structure with arches connecting buildings overhead
wooden planters with red flowers attached to building windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wider street with full sky visibility, revealing colorful pink and red historic buildings. Geralt passes a stone fountain where an NPC sits on the ground, and outdoor seating areas with flower boxes. In the distance, an elevated stone archway bridge becomes visible as the street curves gently to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with mountain vista and market stalls

events.description: entering dark covered stone passage from the sunlit plaza

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking across the open plaza toward a dark tunnel entrance, passing market stalls and outdoor seating

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on stone steps beside the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: distant mountains and blue water visible through an archway opening
wooden market stall with red and white striped awning
shadowed stone tunnel entrance leading to a covered passage
small tower structure with red tiled roof and weather vane

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide plaza with red cobblestones and expansive views of mountains and water in the distance. Geralt walks past market stalls with striped awnings and outdoor seating areas. The segment ends as he approaches and enters a dark stone tunnel entrance, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark tunnel passage leading to service courtyard

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into bright sunlit back courtyard
beginning to ascend stone staircase in the courtyard

agents.ego_description: Geralt passing through the dark tunnel and climbing stone stairs in the back courtyard, following an NPC

notable_agents.action: NPC walking up the stone stairs ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with sacks and goods parked against the wall
wide stone stairs leading upward to a higher courtyard level
weathered stone buildings surrounding the service courtyard
stacked wooden barrels beside the cart

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through a dark, enclosed tunnel with low lighting, then emerges into a sunlit back courtyard. The space contains service elements like a wooden cart with goods, stacked barrels, and a wide stone staircase. He follows an NPC up the stairs, transitioning from the sheltered tunnel to the open courtyard with surrounding stone buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant medieval town that transitions from narrow, sunlit streets into a secluded back courtyard. It begins as Geralt passes through a grand decorative stone archway into a narrow corridor of tall buildings with red pillars and cobblestone paths. As the street curves and opens up, the view expands to reveal colorful pink and red facades, a stone fountain, and an elevated bridge under a clear sky. The scene then broadens into a wide red-cobblestone plaza filled with striped market stalls and distant views of mountains and water, before the camera follows Geralt into the shadow of a dark stone tunnel. Finally, the movement emerges from the dim tunnel back into the sunlight of a back courtyard, passing wooden carts and barrels while ascending a wide stone staircase.
